plugin.name: Calendar Airmail
plugin.description: Send Google Calendar event reminders by airmail with a chosen courier.
config.courier.label: Airmail courier
config.courier.description: Choose the courier that carries your calendar airmail.
command.connect.title: Connect Google Calendar
command.connect.description: Sign in to Google and allow read-only access to your primary calendar.
command.sync.title: Sync now
command.sync.description: Fetch upcoming events from your primary Google Calendar now.
command.disconnect.title: Disconnect Google Calendar
command.disconnect.description: Remove the Google Calendar connection from OpenPets.
command.test.title: Test delivery
command.test.description: Send a sample calendar airmail with your chosen courier.
status.syncedNext: Calendar synced: {count} upcoming event(s). Next: {title} on {startAt}. Airmail reminder due {reminderAt}.
status.syncedEmpty: Calendar synced: no upcoming events found.
status.reconnect: Google Calendar needs to be reconnected.
status.offline: Calendar is temporarily unavailable; keeping existing deliveries.
status.cap: Calendar sync reached its event limit; existing deliveries were kept.
status.error: Calendar sync could not be completed.
delivery.title: Calendar: {title}
delivery.testDetail: Your courier is ready to deliver calendar reminders.
